name: Shreyansh Jain
bio: I architect secure systems and break them — exploring the seams between code, networks, and intelligence. Currently pursuing BCA, training as an ethical hacker, and building tools that defend the digital frontier.

experience.title: Ethical Hacking Intern

experience.title: Member
